mechanism_narrative: A positive trend in payroll employment reflects expanding aggregate income and lower recession risk; when PAYEMS is rising over recent months, expected corporate revenues improve and S&P 500 forward returns are positive over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
fact:latest PAYEMS snapshot value 137993.0 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month PAYEMS growth do not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than months with negative 3-month PAYEMS growth in walk-forward tests, or if the sign is negative in more than 60% of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in unemployment signals weakening household income and rising recession probability; when UNRATE crosses upward by more than 0.3 percentage points over three months, equity risk premia rise and S&P 500 forward returns are negative.
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:latest UNRATE snapshot value 4.8 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average at the 10% significance level.

mechanism_narrative: A high or rising federal funds rate tightens financial conditions, raises discount rates, and reduces the present value of future earnings; when FEDFUNDS crosses above 3.0%, S&P 500 forward returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot value 2.98 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS-above-3.0% trigger windows have nonnegative excess 20-day S&P 500 returns versus non-trigger windows across at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating retail sales indicate stronger nominal household spending and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms; when RSAFS rises at least 0.5% month over month, S&P 500 forward returns are positive over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:latest RSAFS snapshot value 380197.0 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS growth trigger windows have a lower mean 20-day S&P 500 return than non-trigger windows, or if the hit rate for positive returns is below 50% after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth captures improving factory output and operating leverage; when INDPRO increases over a three-month window while unemployment is not rising, S&P 500 forward returns are positive over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
series:UNRATE
fact:latest INDPRO snapshot value 114.2334 as of two months before decision date
fact:latest UNRATE snapshot value 4.8 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition fails to outperform cases where INDPRO is rising but UNRATE is also rising, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in a predictive regression for 60-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp deterioration in housing starts signals weakening construction activity, durable goods demand, and household balance-sheet confidence; when HOUST falls more than 10% over three months, S&P 500 forward returns are negative.
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:latest HOUST snapshot value 1012.0 as of two months before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with a non-declining policy rate signals that inflation pressure is not being offset by easing; this raises real-income stress and discount-rate uncertainty, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:latest CPIAUCSL snapshot value 212.571 as of one month before decision date
fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot value 2.98 as of one month before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-and-policy trigger has a positive average 20-day return or if CPIAUCSL growth only predicts negative returns when FEDFUNDS is falling, contradicting the stated interaction.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth reflects broad demand expansion and supports earnings expectations; when GDPC1 increases quarter over quarter, S&P 500 forward returns are positive over the next 5 trading days after the signal is available.
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:latest GDPC1 snapshot value 11677.1 as of five months before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth quarters are followed by lower 5-day S&P 500 returns than non-positive growth quarters, or if the directional hit rate is below 50% across walk-forward release-date tests.
